# J Abhiram Reddy

> Software Development Engineer with 2.5+ years building and operating production systems, healthcare data pipelines, and AWS cloud architecture.

## Primary Links
- [Portfolio Website](https://jabhiramreddy.dev/): Main Developer Portfolio & Work
- [PDF Resume](https://jabhiramreddy.dev/J%20Abhiram%20Reddy%20Resume.pdf): Full Resume PDF Document
- [LinkedIn Profile](https://linkedin.com/in/j-abhiram-reddy): Professional Work & Connections
- [GitHub Profile](https://github.com/jabhiramreddy-code): Open Source Code Repositories
- [LeetCode Profile](https://leetcode.com/J_Abhiram_reddy/): Competitive Programming & Data Structures
- [Twitter / X Profile](https://twitter.com/jabhiramrrun3): Software Engineering Posts & Updates

## Core Technical Stack
- Languages: TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Node.js
- Frontend: React, Next.js, HTML5, CSS3, Vite
- Backend & Cloud: AWS (ECS, S3, CloudFront), Docker, REST APIs, Microservices
- Databases & Caching: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis
- Compliance & Standards: HIPAA, HL7 FHIR
